ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the institution is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the institution is located */,
  "openapc_data_dir" TEXT /* Directory path to open access publications data */,
  "grid_id" TEXT /* Grid ID for the institution */,
  "ror_id" TEXT /* ROR ID for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published the work */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the funding agency is located */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the funding agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the grant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding awarded */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency awarding the grant */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who received the grant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "institution_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first institution in the collaboration */,
  "institution_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second institution in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_institution_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id2") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_institution_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id1") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_access_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the data belongs to */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the open access data */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the open access data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the open access data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_access_data_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research output */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research output */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the research output */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who produced the output */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of research output (e.g., paper, presentation, poster) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the research output was presented or published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_outputs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
